body: just a tiny dray,,, mighty mouse sold your interest in alliance data,, (it had topped out).. left hundreds of millions on the table, did want proton therapy,( your friend jeffrey is screwing up the deal). we should not buy a 10% stake in Amaxon for 90 million, as it is virtually impossible . for it to make money. I've done the spreadsheets, Dennis hersch doesn't belong on the board. He has NO judgement.. BE careful.!!.Heard you did well today.  step by step
